2605.02661.title: AcademiClaw: When Students Set Challenges for AI Agents
2605.02661.paper_summary: Benchmarks within the OpenClaw ecosystem have thus far evaluated exclusively assistant-level tasks, leaving the academic-level capabilities of OpenClaw largely unexamined. We introduce AcademiClaw, a bilingual benchmark of 80 complex, long-horizon tasks sourced directly from university students' real academic workflows -- homework, research projects, competitions, and personal projects -- that they found current AI agents unable to solve effectively. Curated from 230 student-submitted candidates through rigorous expert review, the final task set spans 25+ professional domains, ranging from olympiad-level mathematics and linguistics problems to GPU-intensive reinforcement learning and full-stack system debugging, with 16 tasks requiring CUDA GPU execution. Each task executes in an isolated Docker sandbox and is scored on task completion by multi-dimensional rubrics combining six complementary techniques, with an independent five-category safety audit providing additional behavioral analysis. Experiments on six frontier models show that even the best achieves only a 55\% pass rate. Further analysis uncovers sharp capability boundaries across task domains, divergent behavioral strategies among models, and a disconnect between token consumption and output quality, providing fine-grained diagnostic signals beyond what aggregate metrics reveal. We hope that AcademiClaw and its open-sourced data and code can serve as a useful resource for the OpenClaw community, driving progress toward agents that are more capable and versatile across the full breadth of real-world academic demands. All data and code are available at https://github.com/GAIR-NLP/AcademiClaw.
2605.02661.paper_summary_zh: 在OpenClaw生態系統內的基準測試迄今為止僅評估了助手級別的任務，將OpenClaw的學術級能力大部分留於未檢視。我們引入了AcademiClaw，一個雙語基準，包括80個複雜的長期任務，這些任務直接來自大學生的真實學術工作流程——作業、研究項目、競賽和個人項目——這些學生發現當前的AI代理無法有效解決。這些任務是從230個學生提交的候選項中經過嚴格的專家評審精心挑選的，最終的任務集涵蓋了25個以上的專業領域，範圍從奧林匹克級的數學和語言學問題到GPU密集型的強化學習和全棧系統調試，其中16個任務需要CUDA GPU執行。每個任務在隔離的Docker沙箱中執行，並根據多維標準進行任務完成評分，這些標準結合了六種互補技術，並且獨立的五類安全審核提供了額外的行為分析。對六個前沿模型的實驗顯示，即使是最好的模型也僅達到55%的通過率。進一步分析揭示了任務領域之間的明顯能力邊界、模型之間的行為策略差異，以及標記消耗與輸出質量之間的脫節，提供了超出總體指標所揭示的細緻診斷信號。我們希望AcademiClaw及其開源數據和代碼能成為OpenClaw社區的有用資源，推動朝著更有能力和多功能的代理邁進，以應對現實世界學術需求的全範疇。所有數據和代碼可在 https://github.com/GAIR-NLP/AcademiClaw 獲得。
